3-4. The place of delivery will correspond to the Rasi Lagna, or Navansa Lagna at birth. If it is a
Dual Rasi, or Navansa, delivery will be on the way. A Fixed Rasi/Ansa indicates delivery in
ones own place. Should the Navansa be of the same Rasi, the delivery is in ones own house,
otherwise it is otherwise. The delivery will be in the house of father, or mother according to
the indicator concerned being strong.
5-7. If benefic planets are in full, then the birth is in an enclosed place, under a tree, or on the
banks of a river. Should all planets be together and not aspect Lagna, or the Moon, then the
birth is in a thick forest. If a watery Sign is on the Ascendant and aspected by Full Moon from
a watery Sign being 4th, or 10th, birth is in water (river etc.) and similar results be predicted, if
Lagna and 4th are occupied by benefics and Full Moon is in watery Sign, or in own House.
